system.description:
This skill combines keen observation, forensics, research, and detailed analysis.
  • Find secrets in a long-forgotten library: Insight/EDU 8+
  • Find additional clues at a crime scene: Insight/INT 10+
  • Determine if someone is lying to you: Insight/INT (Opposed)
  • Spot hidden doors or secret messages embedded in a painting: Insight/INT 10+
system.shortdescr: Keen observation, forensics, research, and detailed analysis.
